title: Add PaginatedResponse interface to note model
notes: Added generic PaginatedResponse<T> interface with data, total, page, limit fields. TypeScript compiles successfully.

title: Add validatePaginationParams helper with unit tests
notes: Added validatePaginationParams function with comprehensive unit tests covering defaults, valid values, non-numeric inputs, zero/negative values, and fractional flooring.

title: Implement pagination in GET handler and update existing tests
notes: Integrated validatePaginationParams into GET / handler. Returns { data, total, page, limit } envelope. Updated 4 existing GET /api/notes tests to use res.body.data. All 31 tests pass, lint clean.

title: VERIFY: Pagination Implementation
notes: Full test suite: 31 tests, 2 suites, 0 failures. Lint: clean. GET /api/notes returns { data: [...], total: N, page: 1, limit: 10 } by default. No regressions.

title: Fix multi-tag handling and add tag filter edge-case tests
phase: Phase 2: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
notes: Fixed multi-tag handling: when req.query.tag is an array (Express parses repeated params), take the last element. Added 3 edge-case tests: empty tag filter returns all notes, nonexistent tag returns empty, multiple tags use last value. All 38 tests pass, lint clean.

title: Add search edge-case tests
phase: Phase 2: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
notes: Added 4 edge-case tests for search: empty query returns all notes, no match returns empty, special chars (c++) handled safely, spaces in query treated as literal substring. All 38 tests pass, lint clean.

title: Add pagination edge-case tests
phase: Phase 2: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
notes: Added 7 edge-case tests: invalid page (abc) → 400, invalid limit (xyz) → 400, limit=0 → 400, page=999 beyond last page returns empty with actual total, limit=100 with 3 notes returns all 3, page=1&limit=2 with 5 notes returns first 2 with total=5, default params return page=1 limit=10.

title: Add composition test (tag + search + pagination together)
phase: Phase 2: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
notes: Added 2 composition tests with 6 notes (varied tags/content). Verified tag+search+pagination compose correctly: total reflects post-filter count, data length respects limit, page/limit match request. Second test verifies page 2 behavior.

title: VERIFY: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
phase: Phase 2: Edge-Case Tests and Tag Filter Fix
notes: Full test suite: 47 tests, 2 suites, 0 failures. Lint: clean. All edge cases covered — tag filter (3 cases), search (4 cases), pagination (7 cases), composition (2 cases). Multi-tag fix verified. No regressions.
